component.name: Subtitle Edit
component.summary: A free, open source subtitle editor

description.p: Subtitle Edit is a powerful, free and open source subtitle editor. It supports hundreds of subtitle formats and provides a comprehensive set of editing tools including:

ul.li: Create, edit, and convert subtitles in hundreds of formats (SRT, ASS, SSA, VTT, STL, and more)
Sync subtitles to video using waveform or spectrogram view
OCR support for image-based subtitle formats (e.g. SUP/Blu-ray)
Batch conversion and fix common errors tools
Video playback with waveform/spectrogram synchronization (requires mpv)

description.p: Subtitle Edit is an offline, privacy-respecting application that does not collect or transmit your data. All core editing features run entirely on your device.
Initial cross-platform release based on Avalonia UI.
